name: Bullgryn Squad
legend: The most obstinate of the Ogryn strain of abhumans, Bullgryns are clad in heavy armour and carry crude assault weaponry built to withstand the thunderous blows Bullgryns strike with them. A line of these heavily muscled humanoids, advancing in shield-lines from which shots bounce harmlessly, is a frightening sight.
loadout: Every model is equipped with: grenadier gauntlet; close combat weapon; slabshield.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain
abilities.description:
FEEL NO PAIN

Some warriors refuse to be laid low, even by what should be fatal wounds.
Some models have ‘Feel No Pain x+’ listed in their abilities. Each time a model with this ability suffers damage and so would lose a wound (including wounds lost due to mortal wounds), roll one D6: if the result is greater than or equal to the number denoted by ‘x’, that wound is ignored and is not lost. If a model has more than one Feel No Pain ability, you can only use one of those abilities each time that model suffers damage and so would lose a wound.

• Feel No Pain x+: Each time this model would lose a wound, roll one D6: if the result equals or exceeds ‘x’, that wound is not lost.

abilities.name: Wall of Muscle
abilities.description: Each time an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Brute Shield
abilities.description: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Slabshield
abilities.description: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

options.description: Any number of models can each have their grenadier gauntlet replaced with 1 Bullgryn maul.
Any number of models can each have their slabshield replaced with 1 brute shield.
